word: G1095 - γηράσκω - gēráskō - ghay-ras'-ko - Be old

sections.paragraph:
- Original: γηράσκω

- Transliteration: Gerasko

- Phonetic: ghay-ras'-ko

- Definition:

1. to grow old

2. of things and institutions: to fail from age, be obsolescent

- Origin: from G1094

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1094; to be senescent: - be (wax) old.
